subcodes.first_line: We exhort you to perform goodly deeds, for the station of every soul is revealed and made manifest through its actions, inasmuch as deeds are a mirror [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وصیت میکنیم شما را باعمال طیبه هر نفسی مقامش از عملش ظاهر و باهر چه که عمل مرآتست
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity in diversity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power of prayer, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @goodly deeds; actions, @praise and encouragement
